CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-17-2024 Continued To Apr-10-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-19-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT PACIFIC FERTILITY CENTER, THE PRELUDE NETWORK, CAROLYN GIVENS, M.D. DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT

Defendants' demurrer to the first amended complaint is sustained with leave to amend. Fraud is not pled with particularity - i.e., facts that "show, how, when, where, to whom, and by what means the representations were tendered." (Lazar v. Sup. Ct. (1996) 12 Cal.4th 631, 645.) Defendants' other points need not be reached at this juncture, but plaintiff is urged to consider them in good faith in the CCP 430.41 meet-and-confer that shall be held.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
